mapper.select: /* oms-report-inXOutboundList-sql-oracle.xml selectInXOutboundDetailList */ SELECT A.SO_HDKEY , A.SO_DTKEY , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , A.UOM , C.CTKEY , D.CTNM , A.INITQTY , TRUNC(COALESCE(A.EXQTY, 0) / CASE WHEN ICUT.ICUNITQTY = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ICUT.ICUNITQTY, 1) END , 3) AS OR_EXQTY , TRUNC(COALESCE(A.CFQTY, 0) / CASE WHEN ICUT.ICUNITQTY = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ICUT.ICUNITQTY, 1) END , 3) AS OR_CFQTY , A.EXQTY , A.CFQTY , ICUT.ICUNITQTY AS QTYUOM , A.TOTALWEIGHT/1000 AS TOTALWEIGHT , CASE A.TOTALWEIGHT WHEN A.TOTALWEIGHT IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'KG' END AS WEIGHTUNIT , A.VOLUME , A.VOLUMEUNIT , A.LOGGRPCD , A.REFERENCEKEY , A.REFERENCEDTKEY , E.UPDATEDATE AS TMS_UPDATEDATE , F.TRPSEQNUM , F.VEHICLENUM , F.DCKEY , A.COMMENTS , A.WKSTATUS AS SO_STATUS , A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , A.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , CO.WKSTATUS AS CO_STATUS , A.ORDER_ERROR_CD , A.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.SO_HDKEY = C.SO_HDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT D ON C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE E ON A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.SO_HDKEY = E.SO_HDKEY AND A.SO_DTKEY = E.SO_DTKEY AND E.DELYN = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE F ON A.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND A.SO_HDKEY = F.SO_HDKEY AND A.SO_DTKEY = F.SO_DTKEY AND F.DELYN = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON A.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON IC.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = ICUT.ICUNITKEY AND A.UOM = ICUT.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT CO ON A.OWKEY = CO.OWKEY AND A.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CO.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND A.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = CO.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.SO_HDKEY = #{soHdkey} ORDER BY LPAD(SO_DTKEY::TEXT, 20, 0)
